description: Protect your digital life with premium security software and privacy tools.

products.name: VPN Secure Pro
products.description: High-speed VPN with military-grade encryption, no-logs policy, and global servers.

products.name: Password Manager
products.description: Securely store and autofill passwords with biometric authentication and breach alerts.

products.name: Encryption Suite
products.description: AES-256 encryption toolkit for files, emails, messages, and entire disk volumes.

products.name: Network Firewall
products.description: Advanced firewall with intrusion detection, traffic filtering, and real-time monitoring.

products.name: Antivirus Plus
products.description: Real-time antivirus protection with malware scanning, ransomware defense, and web protection.

products.name: 2FA Authenticator
products.description: Two-factor authentication app with TOTP codes, push notifications, and backup sync.

products.name: Secure Messenger
products.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging app with self-destructing messages and private calls.
